name: Successful Signature Compromise
notes: This rule triggers when a host signature is successfully compromised.
bb_references: BB:FalseNegative: Events That Indicate Successful Compromise
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:FalseNegative: Events That Indicate Successful Compromise
TD_list: APPLY Successful Signature Compromise on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:FalseNegative: Events That Indicate Successful Compromise
RED_list: Event description: Detects when a host signature is successfully compromised.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
